name: Soroptimist Live Your Dream Award
amount: Up to $16,000 ($10,000 national; additional local/regional awards up to $6,000)

eligibility.citizenship: U.S. citizen, permanent resident, or eligible non-citizen; female
eligibility.other_requirements: Must be a woman with primary financial responsibility for dependents; head of household; enrolled in or accepted to undergraduate/vocational program; demonstrating financial need

stackable_notes: External award; generally stackable with institutional aid.
notes: Targets women who are the primary financial support for their families — non-traditional students, single mothers, survivors of domestic violence. Less competitive than prestige awards; strong fit for adult learners re-entering education. Awards are progressive (local to region to national).
